items.title: Wright scores as Coventry win Championship title
items.summary: Coventry City sealed the Championship title after beating Portsmouth 4-1 at home on Tuesday.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Brandon Aubrey exceeds his NFL goal of sticking on a roster
items.summary: The Cowboys were prepared to have Brandon Aubrey play on the second-round tender of $5.76 million for 2026.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Bulls head coach Donovan resigns after six seasons
items.summary: Billy Donovan resigns as head coach of the Chicago Bulls, ending his six-season tenure, after missing out on the play-offs.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
